violations.text: Working container of sugar was observed not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

Chili was observed held at 125 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chili was placed in steam table that was not powered on over 4 hours prior to visit. PIC voluntarily disposed of items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
